title: Goodyear car tyre inflator air compressor - car tyre inflator 12v - tyre pump - tyre pump with pressure gauge - 12v air pump - inflator pump with LED light - usable for bike, bicycle, basketball, toys
features: KEEP IT SIMPLE - (1) Plug into the cigarette lighter socket (2) Fill you tyre up with air using the easy to read display gauge
PLUG IN AND FILL - Powered by 12v car cigarette lighter socket, fills up to 30PSI (average tyre pressure) in approximately 3 mins. Always check the correct pressure for your tyres in the car door.
WE'VE GOT IT COVERED - Inflation accessories included for car tyres, inflatable toys, footballs, bicycles etc.. Max air pressure 100psi
NIGHT TIME LED - Ultra bright LED light for use at night
EASY TO STORE - Lightweight and compact - doesn't take up much space in the car boot or at home
description: Goodyear 12V 100PSI Air Compressor, your go-to solution for quick and efficient inflation needs. Designed for versatility and ease of use, this air compressor is perfect for a range of applications, from vehicle tires to sports equipment and more. Powerful 12V Operation: Powered directly through your vehicle’s 12V lighter socket, this air compressor ensures consistent performance wherever you go. It’s the ideal tool for on-the-road emergencies or regular maintenance. Impressive 100PSI Max Pressure: Capable of reaching up to 100PSI, this compressor handles a variety of inflation tasks with ease, from car tires to inflatable sports balls and more. Bright LED Light: Equipped with a built-in bright LED light, the compressor allows for convenient operation in low-light conditions, making nighttime or early morning inflations safer and more practical. Compact and Lightweight: Its lightweight and compact design ensures easy portability and storage. Perfect for keeping in your vehicle’s trunk or a home garage without taking up much space. Easy-to-Read Gauge: The integrated gauge features a clear, easy-to-read display, allowing for precise pressure monitoring and adjustments. Easily set and track the exact pressure you need. Complete Inflation Accessories: Comes with a set of essential inflation accessories, including nozzles and adapters for a variety of applications, ensuring you’re fully equipped for all your inflation needs and user-friendly operation.
